steps.instruction: Prepare the vegetables by washing and cutting them into uniform pieces.
Fill a pot with water and bring it to a boil.
Place a steaming basket over the pot and add the vegetables.
Cover the pot and steam the vegetables for 5-10 minutes until tender.
Remove the vegetables and season to taste.

safety_notes: Be careful of steam when removing the lid.
Ensure vegetables are cooked thoroughly to avoid foodborne illness.
